commands.summary: P3/P4 legacy cinema engine surfaces exist under backend/include/kivo/cinema_engine. Key areas include engine_api, playback_core, graph_core, session_core, playback_plan_core, playback_inspector_core, source_core, capability_core, and disc_core.

P5 video plane public contract surfaces exist under include/kivo/video_plane. Key areas include output_boundary, input_bridge, timing, queue, GPU render, protected content/output, recovery, failure, evidence, and thread.

P6 audio plane public/private surfaces exist. Public P6 contract headers live under include/kivo/video/audio_plane. Private real runtime headers live under backend/include_private/video/audio_plane. Real P6 runtime sources live under backend/src/video/audio_plane.

commands.command: Bundled Python count of P3/P4, P5, P6 roots
commands.summary: Counts: backend/include/kivo/cinema_engine 276 headers in 51 dirs; include/kivo/video_plane 219 headers in 44 dirs; include/kivo/video/audio_plane 320 headers in 40 dirs; backend/include_private/video/audio_plane 21 headers in 10 dirs; backend/src/video/audio_plane 30 files in 9 dirs.

commands.command: Get-Content engine_command.hpp playback_state.hpp graph_runtime_state.hpp audio_packet_boundary_item.hpp p5_audio_packet_import_view.hpp audio_clock_snapshot.hpp p6_capability_snapshot.hpp
commands.summary: Observed boundary facts: P4/engine EngineCommand uses std::string command_id and EngineCommandKind Open/Play/Pause/Seek/Recover/Close; PlaybackState has Ready/Playing/Paused/Seeking/Buffering/SwitchingTrack/Recovering/Draining/Ended/Failed/Closed; GraphRuntimeState has graph_generation; P5 output_boundary AudioPacketBoundaryItem is compact and string-based; P6 P5AudioPacketImportView has 27 fields; P6 AudioClockSnapshot and P6CapabilitySnapshot are typed value contracts.

commands.command: Get-Content backend/CMakeLists.txt and rg CMake P5/P6 targets
commands.summary: CMake pattern: P5/P6 contract libraries are INTERFACE libraries under root include; tests are executable targets added in backend/CMakeLists.txt; P6 uses C++23 and has architecture guard test. No separate backend/tests/CMakeLists.txt exists.

exit_criteria_covered: G28 planning input: public include minimized
G30 planning input: gap levels identified

G49 planning input: contract manifest dependency roots identified
G59 planning input: architecture exception roots identified

gap_classification.gap: P4 lacks typed PlaybackCommandId and PlaybackRevision in current public headers; EngineCommand uses std::string command_id and no typed revision.
gap_classification.planned_handling: P7 defines strong PlaybackCommandId, PlaybackRevision, GraphSnapshotRevision, and GenerationStamp. P4StateSyncAdapter isolates legacy P4 command_id/revision absence without modifying P4 locked files.
Use P7 V1.9.1 DOCX as authoritative implementation baseline; retain NOT_VERIFIED reporting for V1.9 carryover.

not_verified_boundaries: Real P4 PlaybackRevision semantics remain NOT_VERIFIED because current P4 has no typed revision contract.
P5/P6 real runtime integration remains NOT_VERIFIED until P7 fake integration and later real adapter gates run.
V1.9 carryover remains NOT_VERIFIED by P7A-003R decision.
notes: P7 can proceed to planning with adapter isolation and no modification to locked P4/P5/P6 files.
C:/kivo video remains the only working directory.
